title: Image Recognition AI
description: How AI sees and understands the visual world

scenes.speech: AI looks at a photo and says 'That's a cat!' Let's learn how!
scenes.title: Image Recognition AI

scenes.speech: Technology for computers to understand images!
scenes.title: What is Image Recognition?
scenes.content: Image recognition automatically identifies objects, faces, and text in photos and videos. Used in smartphone cameras too!

scenes.speech: Images are made of millions of numbers!
scenes.title: Pixels and Data
scenes.content: Digital images are collections of RGB values (Red, Green, Blue). A 1000×1000 pixel image = 3 million numbers!

scenes.speech: The neural network built for images!
scenes.title: CNNs Analyze Images
scenes.content: CNNs learn image features (edges, shapes, textures) step by step. Shallow layers recognize lines, deep layers recognize faces!
scenes.highlight: Lines → Shapes → Textures → Objects (step by step)

scenes.speech: Finding and locating objects in images!
scenes.title: Object Detection
scenes.content: 'Where is what?' detected in real-time. Self-driving cars avoid pedestrians thanks to this technology!

scenes.speech: AI that identifies people by their face!
scenes.title: Face Recognition
scenes.content: Smartphone unlock, criminal investigation, concert ticket verification — face recognition is everywhere. Privacy debates matter too!

scenes.title: Medical Image Diagnosis
scenes.content: AI that detects cancer and fractures in X-rays and MRI scans — sometimes faster and more accurately than doctors!

scenes.speech: AI that creates brand new images!
scenes.title: Image Generation AI
scenes.content: Stable Diffusion, DALL-E, Midjourney generate images from text. Type 'a cat traveling through space' and get an image!

scenes.speech: What future will image recognition create?
scenes.title: Future of Image Recognition
scenes.content: Fully autonomous driving, AI agricultural management, underwater creature monitoring — image recognition's world keeps expanding!

scenes.speech: You understand image recognition AI now! Amazing technology!
scenes.title: Lesson Complete!
